author: Siliconera
text:
The Black ‘Cat’ in the Kuro Complete Edition Manga Always Steals the Show
While Coco and her pet Kuro are the two stars of the Kuro Complete Edition manga, the black "cat" is an absolute scene stealer.

author: Siliconera
text:
Toxy Noxy Foresty Forest Manga Covers How Appearances Can Be Deceiving
Appearances are often deceiving in the Toxy Noxy Foresty Forest manga, and just because mushroom fairies are cute doesn't make them safe.

author: Siliconera
text:
Cai Will Ride an Ostrich in Combat in Fire Emblem Fortune’s Weave
Daiki Yamashita will voice him in Japanese.

author: Siliconera
text:
Evangelion Characters Join The First Descendant in New Crossover
The next The First Descendant crossover is its first anime one and involves Rebuild of Evangelion characters.

author: Siliconera
text:
Honkai: Star Rail Kura Sushi Event Announced
The next Kura Sushi crossover event will be a collaboration with Honkai: Star Rail that stars the characters Aventurine and Sparkle.

author: Siliconera
text:
Second Ado Utattemita Album Cover Song Voting Opens
It's time to vote for a J-pop, Vocaloid, or non-J-pop song you'd like to hear Ado cover for her next Utattemita album.

author: Siliconera
text:
New Frieren FIGURIZMα Figure Is Upside Down
The new Frieren Flower Dance figure in the FIGURIZMα involves a pose of her using magic while floating upside down.

author: Siliconera
text:
Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo Manga Volume 1 Out in English Next Year
Viz Media is working on the physical English release of the Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo manga and volume 1 arrives in 2027.
